creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 185379
Update cacti to 1.1.17

Update cacti to 1.1.17

This is a bugfix release, no need to merge-quarterly.

Commiter: please ignore portlint warnings about gettext, cacti has internal support for gettext so does not require it as a dependancy.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.17/
